official_sources.function_or_member: ServerboundResourcePackPacket(UUID, Action), STREAM_CODEC, id(), action(), Action.isTerminal()
official_sources.authority_note: Decompiled witness path for the packet class when restored; the jar remains authoritative.

field_notes.id: The harness passes this UUID into the official packet constructor; expected body/frame bytes are generated by the official jar.
field_notes.action: The harness resolves this name through the official ServerboundResourcePackPacket.Action enum; expected action encoding and terminal flag are generated by the official jar.

stop_boundary: Proves Configuration serverbound resource_pack response packet framing and dispatch/decode only; do not infer runtime resource pack UI, accept/reject behavior, Configuration completion, or Play readiness.
